movie.title: Young Detective Dee: Rise of the Sea Dragon (2013) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Chinese] BluRay 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Young Detective Dee Rise of the Sea Dragon (2013) A prequel to “Detective Dee and the Mystery of the Phantom Flame” Dee Renjie, a detective with the Imperial police force, investigates reports of a sea monster attacking the town. Soon, he uncovers a sinister conspiracy connected to the royal family.
